objective: Stand up Layer 3 durable memory with Graphiti and Neo4j, including reconciliation from QMD notions into trusted durable memory.
exit_criteria: High-signal QMD notions can appear as tentative cross-thread memory.
Reconciliation can promote or reject tentative memory.
Graphiti receives bounded evidence packages rather than raw log dumps.
risks: Confusing tentative memory with trusted durable memory.
